chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 5633 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) D/o Matter 1. For orders on CMA No.1197/2026 2. For orders on CMA No.21121/2024 23.01.2026 Mr. Sanaullah, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Safdar Deeper, Addl. A.G. Sindh. ------------------------------------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, the petitioner No.2 has prayed for recalling of order dated 06.09.2024, whereby the instant petition was dismissed for non-prosecution. Along with the application, the petitioner No.2 files his affidavit, wherein he has stated that on 06.09.2024 he was not feeling well due to which he could not appear before the Court. Learned Addl. A.G. has no objection to the grant of this application. Accordingly, the listed application bearing CMA No.21121/2024 is granted and the matter stands restored to its original position as it was on 06.09.2024. Let fresh notice be issued to the respondents for 25.02.2026. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
